metadata.description: Standards bypass configuration for this branch

Thin orchestrator - restore_plan/recover_plan_from_backup delegate to restore_ops handler which fires trigger events
Thin orchestrator - aggregate_central delegates to aggregate_ops handler which fires trigger events
